name: Genshin Bunny Club
description:
Ningguang has sent for beautiful women the world over to work at the most extravagant brothel to ever exist. Only the bustiest, most curvaceo- Oops, wrong girls. Her useless assistant didn't seem to understand the assignment, so she got women that are, shall we say, lacking in assets. The Jade Chamber has employed the services of Barbara, Fischl, Mona, Sucrose, Hu Tao, Yanfei, Ayaka, Collei, Layla, Charlotte, Furina, and Mualani. (Natlan has no adult flat chicks, so Mualani will have to do despite being fairly busty. I will consider putting in a Nod-Krai representative in, but I'm pretty clueless when it comes to new characters since I don't play Genshin anymore.) Artist: https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/15114753

I apologize for the long radio silence. I've been doing more "normal" hobbies like painting recently, so I haven't had as much time to write bots. The longer it went without me posting anything, the more awkward it felt coming back. I have no idea how active I will be in the future, but at least for this month I'll post a few things. I'm aware that many images have been disabled due to the new automod. Some should be fine if I reupload with a new image format, but others require something new, which can be a lengthy process so please be patient. It may come down to whether I'd rather put effort into making new bots or focus on fixing images for the old ones.

The new intro message feature here really appeals to me and I've put a few in for this one:
1. Standard opening with Ningguang able to direct you to any girls. (Think House of the Heart bot)
2. Pretty standard Fischl, it's just there to have a better time writing for her.
3. Sucrose wants your semen for alchemical purposes. (Male PoV)
4. Ayaka has accidentally trapped herself playing with bondage equipment and needs help getting out.

Up to 10 intro messages can be saved, so if you have something specific you'd like to see then you can suggest it. This does enable more niche fetishes that I might not want as part of a character's persona.
creator: billyboy7372
